items.check_zh: 调研问题、决策目标、范围内和范围外内容已经明确。
items.check_en: Research question, decision target, in-scope items, and out-of-scope items are explicit.

items.check_zh: 每个使用的来源都有可解析的 ref id，并标注类型、可靠性和用途。
items.check_en: Every used source has a resolvable ref id with type, reliability, and usage.

items.check_zh: 每条 finding 都绑定 evidence ids，且没有无来源事实声明。
items.check_en: Every finding is tied to evidence ids, with no unsupported factual claims.

items.check_zh: 来源观察、推断、决策和未知项被分在不同章节或表格中。
items.check_en: Source observations, inferences, decisions, and unknowns are separated into distinct sections or tables.

items.check_zh: 调研结论明确指出需要更新的 node、doc、reference、template、checklist、test 或 metric。
items.check_en: Research conclusions identify required node, doc, reference, template, checklist, test, or metric updates.

items.check_zh: 实现前需要的静态检查、查询用例、schema/checklist/template 改动和回归风险已经列出。
items.check_en: Required static checks, query cases, schema/checklist/template changes, and regression risks are listed before implementation.

items.check_zh: 文档包含 AI 写作约束，禁止无来源事实、隐藏不确定性、混合事实和推断。
items.check_en: The document includes AI writing constraints that ban unsupported facts, hidden uncertainty, and mixing facts with inference.
